art_market.summary: The Korean art market in March 2026 is focusing on accessibility and cautious recovery. Digital exhibits like '20!2026 Art Seoul' are implementing refund guarantees to build trust.
key_events: 20!2026 Art Seoul: Launched March 16 with an 80% refund guarantee.
Market Trend: Global art sales recovered by 4% but domestic sentiment remains cautious with polarization in high-end segments.
Upcoming: Continued co-scheduling of Kiaf Seoul and Frieze Seoul.
art_market.outlook: Structural transformation towards mid/low-priced segment activity.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI experienced significant volatility in early March 2026 due to Middle East conflict, but is showing resilience and recovery potential.

key_indicators.KOSPI: Volatile; record drop on March 4 followed by strong rebounds. Closing around 5,583 mid-month.
key_indicators.Drivers: Semiconductor demand (Samsung Electronics/SK Hynix) and strong earnings forecasts (130% projected for 2026).
key_indicators.Outlook: Goldman Sachs maintains 7,000 year-end target despite near-term geopolitical risks.
